lessons.title: Lesson 0: Setting up
lessons.description: Set up your computer with the tools required to do the lessons.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Your first web page
lessons.description: Build a simple web page using  HTML.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Landmarks
lessons.description: Add landmarks and other structural elements to your web page.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Lists
lessons.description: Add lists to your web page, both ordered and unordered.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Images
lessons.description: Add some images to your web page.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Tables and hyperlinks
lessons.description: Add tables and hyperlinks to your web page.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Introducing CSS
lessons.description: Learn about Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) and how they can change the look of your web pages.

lessons.title: Lesson 7: External CSS
lessons.description: Learn how to use an external CSS stylesheet to change the look of your web pages and separate content from presentation.

lessons.title: Lesson 8: CSS and lists
lessons.description: Make your lists more visually appealing using CSS.

lessons.title: Lesson 9: Links and CSS
lessons.description: Make your hyperlinks more visually appealing using CSS.

lessons.title: Lesson 10: Responsive Design
lessons.description: Learn about media queries and how they can be used to create responsive web pages that work on both desktop and mobile devices.

lessons.title: Lesson 11: Javascript
lessons.description: Use JavaScript to add interactivity to your web pages.

lessons.title: Lesson 12: External Javascript files
lessons.description: Just as CSS can be put in external files, so can JavaScript. In this lesson you will learn how to use external JavaScript files.

lessons.title: Lesson 13: Errors and Exceptions
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn about errors and exceptions in JavaScript and how to handle them.

lessons.title: Lesson 14: Testing and Debugging
lessons.description: Learn how to test and debug your JavaScript code using the browser's developer tools.

lessons.title: Lesson 15: Forms
lessons.description: Learn how to create forms to collect information from users.

lessons.title: Lesson 16: Cookies
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn about cookies and how they can be used to store information on the user's computer.

lessons.title: Lesson 17: Clients and Servers
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn about the client- server model of the web.

lessons.title: Lesson 18: A server page
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn how to create a simple server page using a server-side language.

lessons.title: Lesson 19: Processing Forms on the server
lessons.description: Learn how to process the data you collect from forms on the server.

lessons.title: Lesson 20: Databases
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn about databases and how to use them to store data for your web applications.

lessons.title: Lesson 21: Security
lessons.description: In this lesson you will learn about basic web security concepts,

lessons.title: Lesson 22: Passwords
lessons.description: Passwords require special handling to keep them secure. In this lesson you will learn how to handle passwords safely.
